articles.title_en: After breaking with her pro-Putin father, activist in Georgia gets six-year sentence in Russia for backing Ukraine
articles.lead_en: A court in Kirov has sentenced Alexandra Pugach, 28, to six years in prison in absentia on charges of spreading “false information” about the Russian military. Pugach is the daughter of one of Vladimir Putin’s official campaign representatives during the 2018 presidential election.
